assertions.description: navigator.credentials.get is the FedCM entry point that consumes the authorization bundle options.
IdentityCredential is exposed as the credential type FedCM returns.
IdentityProvider is exposed for continuation-popup flows that resolve in the IdP window.
credentials.get accepts provider-level fields and params/options without throwing synchronously.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const ctrl=new AbortController();const p=navigator.credentials.get({identity:{providers:[{configURL:'https://example.com/fedcm.json',clientId:'client',fields:['name','email'],params:{scope:'calendar.read'}}]},signal:ctrl.signal});ctrl.abort();return p instanceof Promise;}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: credentials.get accepts the provider-level parameters dictionary used by the authorization bundle.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const ctrl=new AbortController();const p=navigator.credentials.get({identity:{providers:[{configURL:'https://example.com/fedcm.json',clientId:'client',parameters:{scope:'drive.read'}}]},signal:ctrl.signal});ctrl.abort();return p instanceof Promise;}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: The provider list can carry multiple configURL entries for one RP call.
